visual_description: A close-up, over-the-shoulder shot shows a person's hands carefully placing a black and white photograph onto a board. The photo depicts the face of an older Asian man. In the background, other similar photos are visible but out of focus. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is present in the upper left corner. The camera remains steady, focusing on the action of the hands and the photograph. The audio begins with the soft, rustling sound of paper being handled, as if a photograph is being placed onto a surface. The camera angle shifts slightly, showing the hands adjusting the photograph on the board. The focus remains on the hands and the image of the man. The background is a blur of other photos and indistinct shapes. The "风行网" watermark is still visible. The camera pans slightly to the right, revealing a man in a dark suit and white shirt looking down with a serious expression. Other men in suits are visible in the blurred background, suggesting a group of people. The "风行网" watermark remains in the upper left.
